# LOOMLE

LOOMLE is an agent-native Unreal Engine MCP server for Claude Code, Codex, and
other MCP-compatible AI agents.

It helps agents inspect and edit live UE projects through UE-native concepts:
Blueprint graphs, Material graphs, PCG graphs, UMG WidgetBlueprints, asset
metadata, active editor context, compile diagnostics, and play sessions.

Canonical documentation:

- Install: https://loomle.ai/install.html
- Quickstart: https://loomle.ai/quickstart.html
- Tools: https://loomle.ai/tools/
- Releases: https://github.com/loomle/loomle/releases

Install:

```bash
curl -fsSL https://loomle.ai/install.sh | bash
```

Windows PowerShell:

```powershell
& ([scriptblock]::Create((irm https://loomle.ai/install.ps1)))
```

Configure MCP hosts to run:

```bash
loomle mcp
```

After attach, inspect before editing, use palettes for creation, and call
`schema.inspect` when a tool intentionally has operation-specific schemas.

Search terms: Unreal Engine MCP server, UE MCP, Claude Code Unreal, Codex
Unreal, Blueprint MCP, PCG MCP, UMG MCP, Unreal Editor AI agent tooling.
